# BP-101 positive: the body write implicitly commits 200 before the later status.
lang: go
file: BP-101-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

func serve(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	fmt.Fprintln(w, "created")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
